title: U.S. Said to Have Observed Series of Iranian Threats Before Latest Strikes
summary_full: Two U.S. officials said Iran launched drones near American ships, sent speedboats to mine the Strait of Hormuz and stepped up activity at some of its missile sites.
summary_public: Two U.S. officials said Iran launched drones near American ships, sent speedboats to mine the Strait of Hormuz and stepped up activity at some of its missile sites.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: U.S. Said to Have Observed Series of Iranian Threats Before Latest Strikes
